zh.Berwick, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德貝維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Lauder於1400年出生在蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，她的父親Sir John de Lawedre15歲，母親Lady Katherine Landells20歲。她於大約1418年與Henry Wardlaw在蘇格蘭費伏結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1447年在蘇格蘭享年47歲。

zh-hans.Berwick, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德貝維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Lauder于1400年出生在苏格兰培爾培斯时，她的父亲Sir John de Lawedre15岁，母亲Lady Katherine Landells20岁。她于大约1418年与Henry Wardlaw在苏格兰費伏结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1447年在苏格兰享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lauder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

variants.name: Lawter
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lawder
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lowther
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lauderdale
meanings: English: habitational name from the valley of Lauderdale, named from Lauder + either Old Norse dalr or Old English dæl ‘valley’.

variants.name: Lowder
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Lauder was born in 1400, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John de Lawedre, was 15 and her mother, Lady Katherine Landells, was 20. She married Henry Wardlaw about 1418, in Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1447, in Scotland, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Lauder est née en 1400, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John de Lawedre, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Landells, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Wardlaw environ 1418, à Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1447, à Écosse, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Lauder 1400 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Lawedre 15 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Landells 20. Sie hat um 1418 in Fife, Scotland Henry Wardlaw geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1447 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Lauder è nata il nel 1400 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John de Lawedre, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Landells, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Henry Wardlaw circa 1418, nel Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1447, nel Scotland, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Lauderが1400年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父Sir John de Lawedreは15歳，母Lady Katherine Landellsは20歳であった。約1418年にスコットランドフィフでHenry Wardlawと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1447年にスコットランドで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Lauder(이)가 1400년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Lawedre(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Landells(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1418년 스컷랜드 피프에서 Henry Wardlaw(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 스컷랜드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Lauder nasceu em 1400, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John de Lawedre, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Landells, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Wardlaw aproximadamente 1418, em Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1447, em Scotland, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Lauder родилась в 1400 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Lawedre было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Landells, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Wardlaw около 1418 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1447 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Lauder nació en 1400, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John de Lawedre, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Landells, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Henry Wardlaw aproximadamente 1418, en Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1447, en Scotland, a la edad de 47 años.
